questions.title: Hello World
questions.description: Write a program that prints "Hello, World!" to the console.

questions.title: Sum of Two Numbers
questions.description: Write a program that takes two integers and returns their sum.

questions.title: Check Even or Odd
questions.description: Write a method that checks if a number is even or odd.

questions.title: Create a Student Class
questions.description: Create a Student class with name, age, and GPA fields. Include getters, setters, and a method to display student info.

questions.title: Bank Account Class
questions.description: Create a BankAccount class with deposit, withdraw, and getBalance methods.

questions.title: Rectangle Class with Area
questions.description: Create a Rectangle class with width and height. Add a method to calculate area.

questions.title: Find Maximum in Array
questions.description: Write a method to find the maximum element in an integer array.

questions.title: Reverse an Array
questions.description: Write a method that reverses an array in-place.

questions.title: Sum of Array Elements
questions.description: Calculate the sum of all elements in an integer array.

questions.title: Factorial Calculation
questions.description: Implement a recursive method to calculate the factorial of a number.

questions.title: Fibonacci Sequence
questions.description: Write a recursive method to find the nth Fibonacci number.

questions.title: Binary Search
questions.description: Implement binary search on a sorted array.
